description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a sleeveless tank top with a large number '7' on the front and fitted blue jeans. The figure has a lean build, with defined arms extended horizontally to the sides, and stands upright in a neutral pose. He wears sturdy lace-up boots, suitable for walking on city streets or sidewalks. The facial features are stylized, with prominent ears and a short, neatly groomed hairstyle. The tank top is plain on the back, and the jeans are straight-cut, fitting closely to the legs. The overall appearance suggests a young adult, possibly an athlete or someone casually dressed for a day in the city.
description: A stylized adult male in a sleeveless tank top with a '7', blue jeans, and boots, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has a lean build, short hair, and casual urban attire.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tank top with the number '7', facial features, and both arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the fitted shape of the jeans and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the tank top, back of the head, and straight-cut jeans.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the jeans and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless tank top and fitted jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
